title: win-click --dismiss-blocker: auto-dismiss blocking popup dialogs
desc: When win-click reports physical click blocked by a dialog, --dismiss-blocker calls TryDismissBlocker on the blocking #32770 window, waits 400ms, then retries the original click.
steps: Blocking scenario: physReport.ActiveBlocker != null means a popup/dialog is covering the target window and physical click cannot proceed.
With --dismiss-blocker: calls readiness.TryDismissBlocker(hWnd, blocker), then re-probes readiness after 400ms. If blocker persists, returns error with blocker title.
Without --dismiss-blocker (default): error message now includes hint '(use --dismiss-blocker to auto-dismiss)' instead of silent fail.
author: claude
